title: lepisorus miyoshianus
intro: Lepisorus miyoshianus, also known as the Japanese cliff fern, is a species of fern belonging to the family Polypodiaceae. It has been traditionally used in Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and boosting the immune system. Lepisorus miyoshianus can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
